name: scroll-world-kie
description: Build an immersive scroll-scrubbed 'fly through the world' landing page for any industry or brand using Kie.ai by default. As the visitor scrolls, a pre-rendered camera flies from outside each scene into its interior, then flows on to the next scene with no cuts — one continuous connected flight. Generates Seedream scene anchors and strict first/last-frame Seedance camera clips, then wires a portable, framework-agnostic scroll-scrub engine.
